Equipment Finance Horror Stories

Every day, Australian businesses lose money because banks make equipment finance harder than it needs to be.

6+ Week Delays

Your competitor gets the job because they had equipment ready. You're still waiting for approval.

Hidden Costs

Application fees, establishment fees, early exit fees. Banks nickel and dime you to death.

Paperwork Nightmare

Forms, documents, meetings, more forms. Banks make simple things complicated.

The Real Cost:

Every week you wait costs your business money. Equipment prices rise. Interest rates change. Opportunities disappear. While you're stuck in bank bureaucracy, smarter businesses are already making money with their new equipment.

Any Equipment. Fast Approval. Zero Hassle.

We finance any equipment that makes your business money. From small tools to heavy machinery, our streamlined process gets you approved while banks are still asking for more paperwork.

Construction Equipment

Excavators, loaders, cranes, compactors, and heavy machinery.

Common Examples:

Excavators Bulldozers Cranes Compactors Concrete pumps
$50K - $500K+
24 hours

Trade Equipment

Tools and machinery for electricians, plumbers, and skilled trades.

Common Examples:

Work vehicles Power tools Testing equipment Workshop machinery
$20K - $200K
Same day

Manufacturing Equipment

Production machinery, CNC machines, and industrial equipment.

Common Examples:

CNC machines Production lines Quality testing Packaging equipment
$100K - $1M+
48 hours

Technology & IT

Computers, servers, software, and business technology.

Common Examples:

Computer systems Servers Software licences Point of sale systems
$10K - $100K
24 hours

Everything You Get (Worth $12,500+)

We don't just approve loans. You get a complete equipment finance system that saves time, money, and stress.

24-Hour Approval System (Worth $5,000)

Get decisions in 24 hours, not 6 weeks. Strike while opportunities are hot.

Zero Upfront Fees (Worth $2,500)

No application fees, no establishment costs. Keep your cash for the business.

100% Equipment Financing (Worth $3,000)

Finance the full equipment cost. No deposits, no cash flow impact.

Equipment Finance Expertise (Worth $2,000)

15+ years experience. We know what works and guide you to the best solution.

Total Value: $12,500+

Your Cost: $0 Upfront

We only get paid when you get approved. No approval = no fees.

How Fast Equipment Finance Actually Works

Simple, fast, no runaround. Here's exactly what happens when you choose the smart way.

1

Apply in 60 Seconds

Quick online form or phone call. Tell us what equipment you need and we'll handle the rest.

2

Get Approved Fast

We assess your application and get you approved within 24 hours. No committees, no delays.

3

Get Your Equipment

We pay the supplier directly. You get your equipment and start making money immediately.

Start Your Application Call 1300 733 856

Equipment Finance Questions (Honest Answers)

Almost any business equipment including vehicles, machinery, technology, tools, and industrial equipment. New or used, we can finance it if it helps your business make money.
Equipment finance from $20,000 to $500,000+. Larger amounts available for established businesses with strong cash flow.
No deposit required in most cases. We can finance 100% of the equipment cost plus any associated setup or delivery fees.
You own the equipment, so normal warranty and insurance applies. We can help arrange extended warranties and insurance if needed.
Yes, early payouts are allowed. Some lenders charge early payout fees, others don't. We'll find you the most flexible terms available.

Stop Waiting. Start Growing.

Every day you wait is money lost. Equipment prices rise. Opportunities disappear. Get the equipment you need today, not next month.

Get Equipment Finance Quote Call 1300 733 856
